name: index generation: INDEX.md includes _operator/ and _community/ subfolders as their own sections (alongside default namespaces)
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/_operator/acme tree/_community/contoso tree/_meta && echo 'maintainer: a
license: MIT' > tree/_community/contoso/README.md && for d in google _operator/acme _community/contoso; do printf 'source:
  id: s
  authoritative_publisher: A
  authoritative_url: https://a.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > "tree/$d/x.yaml"; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --emit-index "$PWD/tree/_meta/INDEX.md" && grep -E '^## _operator/acme' tree/_meta/INDEX.md 1>&2 && grep -E '^## _community/contoso' tree/_meta/INDEX.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
